data.name: Rei and the Floating City
data.detailed_description:
Rei is on a journey to become a fully-fledged mage when her airship meets a terrible fate. She and her family crash land in Jupeterno and are nursed back to health by some locals... Except apparently once someone arrives in Jupeterno, they're never allowed to leave. Add in political intrigue and a mysterious, beautiful princess, and Rei's chances of ever making it home are crashing as rapidly as her airship did!

Battle through a magical tower full of monsters to get what you need to escape the country... or give in and resign yourself to your fate. Which will you choose?

Find your way home

Speak to locals and investigate Jupeterno to find a way back home.

Turn-based combat Battle

menacing monsters to build up your strength!

Hand Drawn Art

There are plenty of unique, hand-drawn images for you to collect and enjoy.

Battle through a magical tower full of monsters to get what you need to escape the country... or give in and resign yourself to your fate. Which will you choose?

data.short_description: Shipwrecked in a strange country, will Rei ever make it home?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
